news.summary: Consumers and President Trump's goal of lowering energy costs may face challenges due to a continuous increase in crude oil prices. The prices surged following an attack by Israel on Iran. This hike in prices could negatively impact consumers and hinder Trump's efforts as crude oil prices sharply rose amid the attack.
news.headline: Oil prices may surge due to Israel-Iran tensions; post-attack, crude oil prices rose, impacting consumers and Trump's energy cost reduction goals.

news.summary: After his participation in a polo match in England, Mr. Kapur passed away due to a heart attack. Prior to his death, he was married to the renowned Bollywood actress Karisma Kapoor.
news.headline: Sunjay Kapur, businessman and ex of Bollywood star, passes away at 53 from a heart attack after a polo match in England. Formerly wed to Karisma Kapoor.

news.summary: In Lamar, Colorado, Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company part of the Iberdrola Group, is honoring three generations of a family that has contributed to the company's Colorado energy projects for the last twenty years during Father’s Day Weekend. The Allen Family has played a significant role in fostering a culture centered on safety, service, and integrity at Avangrid. Over this period, fathers and sons from this family have collectively worked on multiple energy projects throughout Colorado.
news.headline: Avangrid honors Allen Family, three generations working in Colorado energy projects, emphasizing safety and integrity.

news.summary: Go RVing has revealed the victor of its "Just Beyond Your Door" competition, in line with the launch of the campaign. The winner, Rachel Engen from Colorado, was chosen as part of the initiative leading up to National Go RVing Day on June 14. This campaign is a way to celebrate the joy of exploration and adventure from the comfort of an RV. Rachel Engen, the lucky winner, hails from Colorado and intends to...
news.headline: Colorado family wins RV getaway as part of Go RVing campaign ahead of National Go RVing Day on June 14, 2025.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Ionic Digital Inc., an emerging player in digital infrastructure and bitcoin mining, recently released an open letter addressing stockholders about the upcoming Annual Meeting on July 2, 2025. The letter aims to offer crucial details for informed voting on the two Class I seats up for election. The Annual Meeting will be pivotal for decisions regarding the Company's future direction. Ionic's Board of Directors and management are keen to ensure transparency and shareholder involvement in these key decisions.
news.headline: Ionic Digital Inc. issues open letter to stockholders ahead of Annual Meeting on July 2, 2025 to inform of voting decisions.

news.summary: Today in Berlin, OpenZeppelin and Interop Labs unveiled OpenBridge, a new open source framework empowering developers to incorporate various interoperability protocols within a single message. This significant launch is based on the ERC-7786 crosschain messaging standard, which was recently backed by the Ethereum Foundation's Inter. OpenBridge is set to revolutionize blockchain applications by enabling seamless integration and communication across different networks. With OpenBridge, developers now have access to a powerful tool for enhancing the interoperability of web3 platforms. This development marks a key milestone in the blockchain sector, as it fosters collaboration and innovation in the ecosystem.
news.headline: OpenZeppelin and Axelar launch OpenBridge, a crosschain security framework for onchain apps. Built on ERC-7786 standard.

news.summary: University of Phoenix shared that Kelly Hermann, Vice President of Accessibility and Student Affairs, recently co-presented at the 2025 1EdTech Learning Impact Conference in Indianapolis. The conference took place from June 2-5 at the Marriott Downtown in Indianapolis, Indiana. Hermann's presentation, titled "Equitable Education and the 1EdTech Accessibility Rubric," emphasized the significance of digital ecosystems being accessible and aligned with the latest Web Content Accessibility Guidelines.
news.headline: University of Phoenix VP Kelly Hermann presents at 1EdTech conference on digital accessibility.

news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has appointed Jamie Selway as the new director of the trading and markets division. Selway, who brings a wealth of experience in the cryptocurrency industry, will now lead this crucial division within the SEC. This appointment comes at a significant time as the SEC continues to navigate the complexities of the financial markets. Selway's expertise in the crypto sector will undoubtedly prove valuable in his new role. This decision reflects the SEC's commitment to staying abreast of market developments and ensuring effective regulation.
news.headline: SEC appoints Jamie Selway, crypto industry expert, as new director of trading and markets division.

news.summary: Software company Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ: ADBE) exceeded expectations in their second-quarter financial report, revealing a revenue of $5.87 billion, which outperformed analyst predictions of $5.79 billion. Their adjusted earnings of $5.06 per share also surpassed estimates of $4.96 per share. CEO Shantanu Narayen highlighted Adobe's AI advancements that are revolutionizing various sectors for enhanced creativity. Looking ahead, Adobe is anticipating third-quarter revenue to range between $5.88 billion and $5.93 billion, compared to an estimated $5.87 billion, with adjusted earnings projected at $5.15 to $5.20 per share, above estimates of $5.10 per share. Furthermore, the company increased its revenue outlook for the full year of 2025.
news.headline: Adobe reports beat on Q2 revenue ($5.87B vs. $5.79B est.) and EPS ($5.06 vs. $4.96 est.), raises FY25 guidance. CEO highlights AI innovation. Q3 revenue estimated at $5.88B-$5.93B, EPS at $5.15-$5.20.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the city's budget deficit has ballooned to over $50 million, leading to potential cuts in essential services such as education and healthcare. The mayor announced plans to increase taxes and reduce spending by 15% in order to address the shortfall. Additionally, around 1,000 jobs are at risk as the city grapples with the financial crisis. Residents are concerned about the impact these changes will have on their quality of life. The city council is set to vote on the proposed budget adjustments next week.
news.headline: Details of a plan for 'Trump Accounts' with $1,000 savings for babies are outlined in a recent report.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, The E.W. Scripps Company revealed a fresh long-term deal with the Women's National Basketball Association (WNBA). The agreement entails the continuation of broadcasting regular season Friday night games on ION. Under this deal, these matchups will be available for viewing over the course of multiple years. The E.W. Scripps Company is listed on NASDAQ as SSP.
news.headline: Scripps extends deal with WNBA to air Friday night games on ION for multiple years. #WNBA #Scripps

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, in New York, Hernest, a rapidly expanding home furniture company with a well-established warehousing and logistics presence throughout the United States, unveiled its latest offering - the Renata Collection. This new series is tailored for homeowners looking for sophisticated modern design. The collection is available nationwide and showcases a sleek and contemporary aesthetic. With Hernest's wide distribution network, the Renata Collection is easily accessible to customers across the country.
news.headline: Hernest launches Renata Collection for modern homes with refined design. U.S. footprint.

news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. experienced a decline during midday trading, with the Nasdaq Composite dropping approximately 1% on Friday. The Dow was down by 1.17% to 42,465.24, the NASDAQ dipped by 0.55% to 19,554.01, and the S&P 500 fell by 0.54% to 6,012.88. Energy sector shares saw a significant increase of 1.3% while financial stocks fell by 2.1%. The University of Michigan's consumer sentiment index rose to 60.5 in June from 52.2 in the previous months, surpassing market estimates of 53.5. Unusual Machines, Inc. (NYSE: UMAC) experienced a 12% increase in shares to $9.21 after agreeing to acquire Rotor Lab in a deal valued at $7 million, terminating the acquisition of Aloft. This full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Crude oil up 6%, US consumer sentiment surges in June. Dow down 1.17% to 42,465.24, Nasdaq falls 0.55% to 19,554.01, and S&P 500 drops 0.54% to 6,012.88.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, in Miami, Reed Smith, a global law firm, provided legal counsel to the placement agents involved in spearheading a historic bitcoin treasury deal for Trump Media and Technology Group Corp. The deal was valued at an impressive $2.5 billion, marking it as one of the most significant cryptocurrency treasury acquisitions made by a public company to date.
news.headline: Reed Smith advises placement agents in Trump Media's $2.5B bitcoin treasury deal. Largest crypto acquisition by public firm.

news.summary: The Global Online Mental Health Counseling Market is projected to grow from USD 4,462.6 million in 2025 to USD 8,763.1 million by 2032, with a CAGR of 10.12%. Factors such as increasing prevalence of mental health conditions and reduced stigma around seeking professional support are driving this growth. Individual counseling is expected to generate around USD 1,588.68 million in revenue in 2025, with cognitive behavioral therapy accounting for 35.1% of the market share. The video conferencing segment is projected to contribute nearly one-fourth of the total market revenue in 2025. North America is expected to hold over two-fifths of the market share in 2025, while Asia Pacific is anticipated to exhibit the fastest growth. Factors propelling market expansion include rising awareness of mental health issues and a global increase in mental disorders. However, limited internet access and the usage of medications may hinder market growth.
news.headline: Global Online Mental Health Counseling Market to hit USD 8,763.1 Mn by 2032 (10.12% CAGR) from USD 4,462.6 Mn in 2025. North America leads; Asia Pacific fastest-growing due to rising mental health awareness and disorders. Increasing demand due to burden of mental disorders and growing awareness. Online therapy offers convenient support at home. Limited internet access and medication use restrain growth.

news.summary: In response to the recent record-breaking flooding in San Antonio and its suburbs, U-Haul® has announced that they will be providing assistance by offering 30 days of free self-storage and U-Box® container usage. This offer is available at 16 facilities across the San Antonio metro area. The flooding, which occurred on Thursday, resulted in up to seven inches of rain, leading to flash floods that rendered streets impassable. The floods also caused vehicles to be swept away and unfortunately led to several fatalities. Additionally, it is expected that some residential properties have suffered water damage. U-Haul's initiative aims to provide those affected with access to dry and secure self-storage units and portable storage containers during this challenging time.
news.headline: U-Haul provides 30 days free storage and U-Box use in San Antonio after record flooding, 7 inches rain with fatalities.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Dr. Kathy Bloomgarden, the CEO of Ruder Finn, received the prestigious Agency Leader award in the PR, Marketing, and Communications sector at the Campaign Agency of the Year Global Awards. news.headline: Kathy Bloomgarden of Ruder Finn wins Agency Leader in PR at Campaign Agency of the Year Global Awards.
